• Further, under the standard set forth in the previous paragraph, skilled care 
is necessary for the performance of a safe and effective maintenance 
program only when (a) the particular patient’s special medical 
complications require the skills of a qualified therapist or by a qualified 
therapist assistant under the supervision of a qualified therapist
